elements.title: Business Continuity Management and Operational Resilience
Data Security and Privacy Lifecycle Management
Security Incident Management, E-Discovery, & Cloud Forensics
Supply Chain Management, Transparency, and Accountability

notes: 18 control domains. The 17 CCM-inherited domain titles (all except MDS) confirmed VERBATIM against the official CSA Cloud Controls Matrix v4.0.12 machine-readable dataset (primary-dataset.json, domains array) — AICM v1.1 inherits CCM v4's domain structure unchanged, and all 17 matched exactly. MDS = 'Model Development Security' is the AICM-specific 18th domain (not present in CCM), confirmed from CSA AICM v1.1 coverage. Domain abbreviations (IDs) cross-checked. Version/date (v1.1, 2026-06-22) and count (18 domains, 247 controls) confirmed from the CSA AICM v1.1 artifact page. Residual note: titles verified against CCM v4.0.12; AICM v1.1 builds on CCM v4.1, but domain names are stable between CCM 4.0.x and 4.1. Coarse mapping targets the domain, not individual control IDs.
